description: Plaid provides a suite of APIs that enable developers to connect user bank accounts, retrieve transaction data, verify balances, and perform identity verification for fintech applications.
authentication: API key-based authentication using public and secret keys; supports OAuth for certain flows.
self_serve: Yes – developers can sign up, obtain API keys, and access sandbox environments directly from the Plaid dashboard.
api_surface: Extensive RESTful API with endpoints for Accounts, Auth, Balance, Identity, Income, Investments, Liabilities, Payments, Transactions, and more. Supports webhooks for real-time updates.
mcp: Marketplace/Partner integrations are available through Plaid’s Partner Program, allowing third‑party services to integrate with Plaid’s data streams.
buildability: High – comprehensive SDKs (JavaScript, Python, Ruby, Java, Go, .NET), detailed documentation, sandbox testing, and quickstart guides.
main_blocker: Regulatory compliance and KYC/AML requirements can delay onboarding; also requires handling sensitive financial data securely.
